---
name: code-review
description: >-
  Reviews files for common early-stage project issues: missing docs,
  weak naming, and missing test updates.
---

# Code Review Skill

## What to check
1. README has setup and test instructions.
2. AGENTS.md points to specs and project conventions.
3. Changed behavior is reflected in specs.
4. Secrets are not tracked.

## Reporting format
- File path
- Issue
- Suggested fix
